parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO s_zernio.linkedin_account_analytics (
  account_id, platform, username, impressions, members_reached, reactions, comments, reshares, post_saves, post_sends, fetched_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.accountId }}',
  '{{ $json.platform }}',
  '{{ ($json.username || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.impressions }},
  {{ $json.members_reached }},
  {{ $json.reactions }},
  {{ $json.comments }},
  {{ $json.reshares }},
  {{ $json.post_saves }},
  {{ $json.post_sends }},
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (account_id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  username = EXCLUDED.username,
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  members_reached = EXCLUDED.members_reached,
  reactions = EXCLUDED.reactions,
  comments = EXCLUDED.comments,
  reshares = EXCLUDED.reshares,
  post_saves = EXCLUDED.post_saves,
  post_sends = EXCLUDED.post_sends,
  fetched_at = EXCLUDED.fetched_at;

=INSERT INTO s_zernio.linkedin_posts (id, content, url, published_at, fetched_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.post_id }}',
  '{{ ($json.content || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  '{{ $json.published_at }}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (id)
DO UPDATE SET
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  url = EXCLUDED.url,
  published_at = EXCLUDED.published_at,
  fetched_at = EXCLUDED.fetched_at
RETURNING id AS post_id, '{{ $json.accountId }}' AS "accountId";

=INSERT INTO s_zernio.linkedin_post_analytics (
  post_id, impressions, likes, comments, shares, clicks, saves, sends, fetched_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.post_id }}',
  {{ $json.impressions }},
  {{ $json.likes }},
  {{ $json.comments }},
  {{ $json.shares }},
  {{ $json.clicks }},
  {{ $json.saves }},
  {{ $json.sends }},
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (post_id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  likes = EXCLUDED.likes,
  comments = EXCLUDED.comments,
  shares = EXCLUDED.shares,
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  saves = EXCLUDED.saves,
  sends = EXCLUDED.sends,
  fetched_at = EXCLUDED.fetched_at
RETURNING post_id;

=INSERT INTO s_zernio.linkedin_post_timeline (
  post_id, date, impressions, reach, likes, comments, shares, saves, clicks, views, fetched_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.post_id }}',
  '{{ $json.date }}',
  {{ $json.impressions }},
  {{ $json.reach }},
  {{ $json.likes }},
  {{ $json.comments }},
  {{ $json.shares }},
  {{ $json.saves }},
  {{ $json.clicks }},
  {{ $json.views }},
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (post_id, date)
DO UPDATE SET
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  reach = EXCLUDED.reach,
  likes = EXCLUDED.likes,
  comments = EXCLUDED.comments,
  shares = EXCLUDED.shares,
  saves = EXCLUDED.saves,
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  views = EXCLUDED.views,
  fetched_at = EXCLUDED.fetched_at;

=INSERT INTO s_zernio.linkedin_follower_stats (account_id, current_followers, growth, growth_percentage, last_updated, fetched_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.accountId }}',
  {{ $json.currentFollowers }},
  {{ $json.growth }},
  {{ $json.growthPercentage }},
  '{{ $json.lastUpdated }}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (account_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  current_followers = EXCLUDED.current_followers,
  growth = EXCLUDED.growth,
  growth_percentage = EXCLUDED.growth_percentage,
  last_updated = EXCLUDED.last_updated,
  fetched_at = EXCLUDED.fetched_at
RETURNING account_id AS "accountId";

=INSERT INTO s_zernio.linkedin_content_decay (
  platform, bucket_order, bucket_label, avg_pct_of_final, post_count, fetched_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.platform }}',
  {{ $json.bucket_order }},
  '{{ $json.bucket_label }}',
  {{ $json.avg_pct_of_final }},
  {{ $json.post_count }},
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (platform, bucket_order)
DO UPDATE SET
  bucket_label = EXCLUDED.bucket_label,
  avg_pct_of_final = EXCLUDED.avg_pct_of_final,
  post_count = EXCLUDED.post_count,
  fetched_at = EXCLUDED.fetched_at;
